title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a model that applies image-generation diffusion techniques to text generation using uniform state diffusion. The architecture shifts local LLMs from memory-bound to compute-bound, theoretically achieving generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs through bidirectional multi-pass refinement.
writeup: Better Stack covers DiffusionGemma, a Google DeepMind model that brings diffusion techniques from image generation to text generation via uniform state diffusion. The architecture shifts local LLMs from memory-bound to compute-bound, which matters for the throughput ceiling of local inference. The central claim: bidirectional multi-pass refinement that theoretically exceeds 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The video also touches on test-time compute and sparse attention as part of the approach.
